title: Luffy Reaches the Castle
description: On pages 1–3, luffy reaches the castle as luffy reaches Dr. Kureha’s castle and meets Chopper, while the people below continue resisting Wapol’s return.
scene: Luffy Reaches the Castle. Luffy reaches Dr. Kureha’s castle and meets Chopper, while the people below continue resisting Wapol’s return. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: come on, Usopp, hang in there!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: mm... don't wake me up now, Vivi. I'm in the middle of a good dream.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I can see a flowerbed and river so beautiful they look like they belong in heaven...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Wake up, Usopp! If you fall asleep now, you'll die!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Thanks for saving me back there, Viv1.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And I'm glad too that you're alive.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Is it just me or is my face swollen a bit...?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: N-NO, it's just... Frostbite. Yeah, Frostbite!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Living on a winter island sure is tough with the extreme cold and all...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Anyhoo, we better find out where exactly we are right now.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: A random avalanche on top of this freezing cold? Talk about a bad stroke of luck...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Well, I guess I should just consider this as an extension of my winter endurance training...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The hell are you two doing here?

summary: This part centers on luffy reaches the castle, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
